options.a: A point in space on the final approach track where the intermediate approach altitude/height intercepts the nominal glide path/microwave landing system (MLS) elevation angle.
options.b: It is designed to place the aircraft on the localizer or the MLS azimuth specified for the final approach track.
options.c: It identifies the beginning of the intermediate approach segment of an instrument approach procedure.
options.d: It is the point of intersection of an electronic glide path with the applicable DA/H in APV or precision approaches.
